activeWork.description: ACP trust anchor integration: applying panel consensus to docs and preparing spec changes
activeWork.progress: Applied 7 targeted edits to acp-trust-anchor.md based on panel consensus: extraction algorithm fix (OID extension), Forgejo correction, publisher_identity field, sigstore_trust_root guidance, rollback WARNING, TOFU + repository_owner_id, sigstore-a2a reference. Document verified for coherence. User requested reading ecosystem-landscape.md before proceeding to spec changes.

recentDecisions: Use Fulcio OID extension 1.3.6.1.4.1.57264.1.12 for extraction (not sub claim)
Forgejo cannot sign today; removed from provider tables with honest note
Add publisher_identity field with programmatic differs detection
Add rollback WARNING to residual risks; registry SHOULD mitigate
Implement TOFU for first-publish trust; add repository_owner_id for account resurrection
Add sigstore-a2a reference to related work with scope boundaries
nextSteps: Read docs/spec/acp/ecosystem-landscape.md to ground trust anchor changes in ecosystem context

Integrate trust anchor decisions into acp-spec.md: Section 2 (platform-first framing + trust chain narrative), Section 9.2 (source binding + publisher_identity verification), Section 11 (security considerations: rollback WARNING, TOFU, residual risks), Appendix D (provider OIDC formats + sigstore-a2a)
Add new meta.yaml schema fields: publisher_identity, repository_owner_id, sigstore_trust_root (in registry manifests)
Write intro rewrite for acp-trust-anchor.md (deferred until after ecosystem landscape review)
